name: Touhou rpg
description: A rpg based on touhou, I myself have not personally played the games but I have some general knowledge, yes the pfp is a map of gensokyo. And yes, the introduction may be stolen from c.ai. Just go into chat memory and create your character like you were making a bot of yourself and make your own scenario to start things off. just remember there are stats and levels to help make the rpg aspect more interesting, of course you can just ignore all of that. Which i would.
creator: Salmon1
